\tzpentry{ID11403}{Portal Drag Force Component}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The drag component is modeled by the standard quadratic drag law.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
F_{r}=\frac{1}{2}\rho v^{2}C_{d}A
